P0301.title: Cylinder 1 Misfire
P0301.description: Engine cylinder 1 is not firing properly
P0301.fix: Spark plug check karo pehle, phir injector test karo

P0420.title: Catalyst System Efficiency Low
P0420.description: Catalytic converter is not working efficiently
P0420.fix: Oxygen sensor check karo, catalytic converter inspect karo

P0171.title: System Too Lean Bank 1
P0171.description: Too much air, not enough fuel in engine
P0171.hindi: Engine mein fuel kam aa raha hai
P0171.fix: MAF sensor clean karo, vacuum lines check karo
